body.title: CLOSED: instance.focus_state cross-cycle persistence
body.description:
New `instance.focus_state` table (single-row upsert pattern, id=1). Schema: id serial PK, memory_id bigint (FK clan.memories), activation_score float, status text (candidate|committed), committed_at timestamptz, expires_at_cycle int, ne_cycle_counter int default 0, focus_history jsonb default '[]'. API in `wild_igor/igor/cognition/focus_state.py`: get_focus() → dict|None; update_from_activation(memory_id, score) (called by activate()); advance_cycle() → bool (True if focus expired); reset_focus().

Displacement hysteresis: update_from_activation() displaces current focus only if new_score >= current_score * HYSTERESIS_FACTOR (module constant = 1.2). Status: candidate on first set, committed when committed_at is set (by habit or manual). Committed focus expires when ne_cycle_counter reaches expires_at_cycle (set to current + EXPIRY_CYCLES at commit time; EXPIRY_CYCLES = 5). focus_history is JSONB ring buffer capped at 5 entries [{memory_id, score, ts}]; pop oldest on overflow.

**Affected files:** `wild_igor/igor/cognition/focus_state.py` (new), DB migration (CREATE TABLE instance.focus_state)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; direct psycopg2; single-row upsert (ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE); focus_history ring buffer enforced in update_from_activation(); HYSTERESIS_FACTOR=1.2 and EXPIRY_CYCLES=5 as module-level constants (overridable for tests via monkeypatch)
**Scope boundary:** IN — focus_state.py CRUD, instance.focus_state schema. OUT — no NE wiring (separate ticket), no activate() logic (activate() calls update_from_activation() — see T-igor-activate-primitive).
**Test plan:** update_from_activation() inserts first focus as candidate; score 1.19× current does not displace (below hysteresis); score 1.2× displaces; advance_cycle() at expires_at_cycle returns True (expired); focus_history capped at 5 (6th entry drops oldest); reset_focus() clears row
